title: DN14 5TG, Ingredion UK Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/ZP3232DD/S002
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender issue letter and site condition report evaluation template for:    Operator name: Ingredion UK Limited   Installation name: Ingredion UK Limited   Permit number: EPR/ZP3232DD/S002   "
